scene: A cute round wombat with a slightly surprised face, and a neat little stack of three cube-shaped poops sitting on the ground beside it. Flat warm green background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A simple cutaway diagram of a wombat's belly showing a tube with alternating stiff thick patches and soft stretchy patches squeezing a brown blob into a neat cube shape. Flat soft yellow background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A proud little wombat carefully stacking cube-shaped poops on top of a flat rock like trophies, tiny sparkle marks of pride around it. Flat teal background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

Side by side comparison: a round poop rolling and falling off a rock with motion lines, next to a cube poop sitting perfectly still on a rock with a little gold crown above it. Flat coral pink background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
